name: phase17_19_tools
outcome_goal: Activate tool modules: document processor, data pipeline, unified search

jobs.label: p17_document_processor
jobs.prompt:
You are working at the Praxis repository root (paths below are relative to it).

Two changes:

1. Add POST /api/tools/document-process to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py:
- Accepts {content: string, steps: string[]}
- Steps: 'parse' (extract structure — split into sections, find headers, lists, key-value pairs), 'transform' (normalize — lowercase keys, trim whitespace, format dates), 'validate' (check required fields present), 'output' (format as clean JSON)
- Process sequentially, return {steps: [{name, status, result}], final_output: ...}
- Pure Python, no external libs

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/DocumentProcessorModule.tsx:
- Add a textarea for pasting content
- 'Process' button sends to /api/tools/document-process
- Also reads from World 'shared.document_content' (written by file-drop module)
- Show step statuses updating progressively
- Display final result in a formatted view
- Write result to World 'shared.document_result'

Write both files.

jobs.label: p18_data_pipeline
jobs.prompt:
You are working at the Praxis repository root (paths below are relative to it).

Two changes:

1. Add POST /api/tools/data-pipeline to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py:
- Accepts {source: {type: 'objects'|'api', query?: string, endpoint?: string}, transforms: [{op: 'filter'|'map'|'aggregate'|'sort', field: string, args?: any}], output: 'table'|'chart_data'|'csv'}
- Source 'objects': query objects table with optional type filter
- Source 'api': fetch from endpoint
- Transforms execute sequentially on the data array
- Return {result: transformed_data, row_count: N, columns: [...]}

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/DataPipelineModule.tsx:
- Source selector: dropdown for 'objects' (shows object types) or 'api' (text input for endpoint)
- Transform builder: list of transforms, each with op dropdown + field input + args
- Add/remove transforms
- Output format selector
- 'Run Pipeline' button
- Show results inline: table preview or chart data
- Write result to World 'shared.pipeline_result'

Write both files.

jobs.label: p19_unified_search
jobs.prompt:
You are working at the Praxis repository root (paths below are relative to it).

Two changes:

1. Add GET /api/search to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py:
- Query params: q (required), scope (default 'all', options: all|objects|manifests|workflows|dispatches)
- Searches FTS indexes across: objects (search_vector), app_manifests (search_vector), receipt_search (search_vector)
- Returns unified results: [{type: 'object'|'manifest'|'dispatch', id: string, title: string, snippet: string, score: float}]
- Limit 20 results, ranked by score

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/SearchPanelModule.tsx:
- Change default endpoint to /api/search
- Add scope tab bar: All | Objects | Apps | Dispatches
- Click a result: if manifest, navigate to /?manifest=<id>. If object, publish to World.
- Show type badge on each result (colored by type)

Write both files.
